role: HR Admin (mapped to Suresh M / RECRUITMENT ADMIN — no HR Admin demo card)

flows.name: S1 Hire-to-Retire steps 1-5 (create job, pipeline, agency)

bugs.title: Demo Login Panel is missing an 'HR Admin' card required by W3 contract
repro: Observe 8 roles present: SUPER ADMIN, MANAGER, TEAM LEAD x3, EMPLOYEE, HR MANAGER, RECRUITMENT ADMIN — but no HR ADMIN
bugs.impact: QA harness and orchestrator cannot realize the HR Admin role via one-click demo login; forces fallback to RECRUITMENT ADMIN which has narrower permissions.

bugs.title: POST /auth/refresh returns 401 when another tab logs in as the same demo user (session invalidated silently)
repro: Tab A: click Suresh M demo card -> lands on /dashboard
Tab B (any parallel worker): click Suresh M demo card
Tab A: navigate to /recruitment/jobs -> ApiClient throws [ERROR] POST /auth/refresh 401 -> middleware redirects to /auth/login?returnUrl=...
bugs.evidence: console messages [1] and [5] captured on tab 1283664352 at 00:28:58 and 00:30:18
bugs.impact: Concurrent parallel test harness or any two analysts using the same demo persona in different browsers/tabs will silently kick each other to login. Breaks shared-demo-account QA workflow. Root cause is likely single-active-JWT refresh-token rotation invalidating prior session without surfacing a 'signed in elsewhere' UX.

bugs.title: Notifications/Workflow-inbox polling 30s timeout on first navigation after login
bugs.notes: Server returned 200 eventually but client-side ApiClient hit 30s timeout. Suggests slow cold-cache response or axios timeout set too tightly for notification polling endpoints on first-paint.

summary.shard_status: PARTIAL — login succeeded, first 3 pages verified, then session invalidated by parallel worker login collision; per hard-rule #5 (2-retry cap) shard exited early to avoid blocking swarm.

notes: No 'HR Admin' role card exists in Demo Accounts panel; used 'Suresh M / RECRUITMENT ADMIN' as nearest admin-tier recruitment persona. Sessions kept being kicked because multiple W-workers share the same small set of demo personas. Recommend: (a) add dedicated HR ADMIN demo card, (b) allow concurrent sessions for a single demo identity in demo mode, or (c) assign unique demo identities per W-worker slot.
